title: Co-Founder of Tinder Says He Looks For THIS in a Founder
summary: A brief discussion about the qualities and characteristics that make successful startup founders, including age range preferences, motivation factors, and the importance of having a 'chip on their shoulder.'

key_claims.claim: Good founders need to have an irrational sense of drive that most normal people don't have
The ideal founder age range is between 22 to 35 years old
Financial success should be among the top three or four motivations for founders, but not the first or second reason
